---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Gitea:
      href: https://git.sugerplum.uk/HomeLab/.profile
    - text: Website Source
      icon: github
      href: https://git.sugerplum.uk/HomeLab/Homepage.git
---

This is a simple blog page made to share my passion for projects on computers. I am happy to finally get a public interface and plan on doing a lot of fun posts.
